summary: Review diagnostic settings for source resources, exported categories, metrics, destinations, and visible telemetry-routing posture.

monitoring_sinks.name: law-soc-prod
monitoring_sinks.summary: logAnalytics sink "law-soc-prod" is visible through declared destination; referenced by 1 telemetry route(s).

monitoring_sinks.name: send
monitoring_sinks.summary: eventHubs sink "send" is visible through declared destination; referenced by 1 telemetry route(s).

sources.disruption_reason: supported high-signal categories are not exported by visible settings; current identity has visible diagnostic settings write control

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Sets the Azure Monitor export object on the source resource.
capability_steps.boundary: Does not prove a source event occurred or was collected.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Chooses which resource's logs, metrics, or activity export posture is shaped.
capability_steps.boundary: Source value is ranked from visible type and current settings, not from future activity.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Controls which visible categories or metrics are exported to the configured sink.
capability_steps.boundary: Default output names categories present in visible settings; supported-but-absent categories need a catalog pass.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Moves selected telemetry toward Log Analytics, Storage, Event Hubs, or a partner destination.
capability_steps.boundary: Does not call a destination wrong without an expected SOC sink baseline.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Makes the category and destination posture durable as Azure configuration.
capability_steps.boundary: Persistence here means stored management-plane posture, not proof of sink delivery.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Can leave monitoring objects present while selected evidence is not exported by the visible setting or is routed elsewhere.
capability_steps.boundary: Does not claim detector failure or malicious intent from posture alone.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: The export posture remains until another actor or automation changes it.
capability_steps.boundary: Change author and timing require activity-log history.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Common cover stories include onboarding, migration, cost control, archive routing, and category cleanup.
capability_steps.boundary: Cover story is an administrative explanation, not a claim of benign or malicious intent.

current_identity_context.name: azurefox-lab-sp
current_identity_context.summary: Current foothold `azurefox-lab-sp` has visible diagnostic settings write control.

current_state.export_posture: no visible diagnostic settings on this source

not_collected_by_default.name: supported category catalog
not_collected_by_default.reason: Default output attempts the supported-category catalog, but Azure can reject category reads for some source types; those are reported as collection issues rather than treated as unsupported categories.

not_collected_by_default.name: activity-log change history
not_collected_by_default.reason: Actor, timing, quick revert, and maintenance-window proof require history collection outside the default posture view.

not_collected_by_default.name: sink contents
not_collected_by_default.reason: Log Analytics, Storage, Event Hub, or partner sink contents are data/content evidence, not management-plane posture.

not_collected_by_default.name: detector wiring
not_collected_by_default.reason: Sentinel and defender rule dependencies are not inspected, so the command cannot claim a detection failed.

not_collected_by_default.name: expected SOC destination baseline
not_collected_by_default.reason: Destination drift needs a defended expected sink model before the tool can call the current sink wrong.
